privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for snap_env cartographic_map_preparation task by confirming that the Sentinel-2 True Color Image data is downloaded from the real AWS Sentinel-2 registry (tile S2A_31TGM_20201223_0_L2A). Verified the expected PNG export path (/home/ga/snap_exports/press_release_map.png) and GeoTIFF subset export path (/home/ga/snap_exports/subset_tci.tif) exactly match both the task description instructions and export_result.sh. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
